---
title: "Xiangtao Xu"
subtitle: "Associate Professor, EEB Cornell"
image: /images/portraits/xiangtao-xu.jpg
role: pi          # informational tag only (current vs alumni is decided by folder)
weight: 1         # controls card order among current members (lower = first)
aliases: ["Xiangtao Xu", "X. Xu", "X Xu"]   # name variants, for matching against publication author lists
about:
  template: trestles      # nice profile layout: photo on the side, bio + links
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:xx286@cornell.edu"
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: "https://twitter.com/XiangtaoX"
    - icon: record-circle
      text: ORCID
      href: "https://orcid.org/0000-0002-9402-9474"
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=fAorsowAAAAJ"
---

I am a plant and ecosystem ecologist with broad interests in environmental science and Earth System Science. My research revolves around the role of vegetation in our
Earth system and searches for quantitative frameworks to understand their
ecophysiology and make predictions. I am also interested in novel methods to
characterize plant activities across different spatial and temporal scales such as
ecological remote sensing.

Currently I teach *BIOEE 1610 Introductory Biology: Ecology and the Environment* and
*BIOEE 3550/6550 Ecological and Environmental Data Analytics*.
